sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The key change: purple blocks went from 3 to 4. A new purple pixel appeared at row 63, col 0 (bottom-left corner). The bottom bar changed from 64 white pixels to 1 purple + 63 white pixels.
Looking at the purple blocks at top - they have yellow-white-yellow dot patterns below them. The middle one has a white dot at row 11, col 21 which I clicked. Now there's a purple pixel at the bottom left.
Maybe the goal is to click on the purple blocks themselves to "collect" them, and the bottom bar tracks progress? The bottom bar on level 1 had purple+white, and now level 2 has 1 purple + 63 white.
Let me try clicking on one of the purple blocks (not the dot below it) to see if that does something. The purple blocks are at rows 7-10, cols 14-16 (first one).
